SC/ST Cell
SC/ST Cell of Sri Eshwar has been established to take care of the welfare of the SC/ST students and staff members. It is a facilitating centre for SC/ST Students and staff members to provide representations to the university and the Government. Following is the constitution of the SC/ST Cell.
